description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a sleek, minimalist design and a deep black color. The sofa features three large seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all of which appear to be well-padded and uniform in size. The right side of the sofa extends outward to form a chaise lounge, providing ample space for reclining. Both ends of the sofa are finished with wide, rectangular armrests that are padded for comfort and have a straight, boxy profile. The upholstery is smooth and appears to be made of leather or a high-quality synthetic material, giving the sofa a slightly glossy finish. The base of the sofa is low to the ground, with the legs either hidden or recessed, contributing to its contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern black L-shaped sectional sofa with smooth upholstery, wide padded armrests, and a chaise lounge extension. The design is sleek, boxy, and low-profile with uniform cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat and back cushions, and both wide armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the chaise lounge extension, and the straight armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniform height of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main seating area and the armrest on the left, with the chaise lounge receding.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all loose and rectangular, with a chaise lounge extension forming an L-shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, rectangular armrests at both ends, padded and at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, minimalist profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base design that gives the sofa a low, grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three loose, uniform back cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
